title: Determination
description: The Tax Commission's determination on an assessment appeal — the hearing result and any offer of relief. After review (with or without a hearing) the Commission may offer a reduction in assessed value, reclassify the property, or make no change. NET-NEW at the per-application level: there is NO public API and NO Open Data twin for an individual determination/offer (it lives in the online filing system); the aggregate published record of granted reductions is the Assessment Actions dataset (4nft-bihw), which this schema mirrors.

action.description: The Commission's action on the application.

hearingHeld.description: Whether a hearing was held (some applications are decided on the papers).

offered.description: Whether an offer of relief was made.

offerAccepted.description: Whether the applicant accepted the offer.

reviewedBy.description: Commissioner or hearing officer of record.
